title: claytonia alba var. normalis
intro: Claytonia alba var. normalis, also known as White Miner's Lettuce or White Spring Beauty, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Portulacaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and stems are rich in vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients, providing health benefits such as improving heart health, boosting the immune system, and supporting digestive health. Claytonia alba var. normalis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
